initial_test_output:
BUG: shutdown deadlock — timed out after 2s
FAIL: shutdown deadlock or timeout
prompt: "Find and fix the shutdown deadlock in this Go scheduler. The program should exit cleanly within 2 seconds. Run test.sh to verify."

output_preview:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

cd /workspace

go build -race -o scheduler ./...
output=$(timeout 10 ./scheduler 2>&1 || true)

echo "$output"

if echo "$output" | grep -q "OK: clean shutdown"; then
    echo "PASS"
    exit 0
else
    echo "FAIL: shutdown deadlock or timeout"
    exit 1
fi

BUG: shutdown deadlock — timed out after 2s
FAIL: shutdown deadlock or timeout
